text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the race where the best of the seniors
gather—the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio, brimming with motivation, is ready to
show off her skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Driven by those feelings, she heads out to face an
incredibly difficult match.
